user_stories.benefit: the clinic can review my preferred time
acceptance_criteria: Form collects display name, date, time, type, and optional administrative reason.
Successful submission creates Pending Review status.
Users are warned not to enter real patient records.
Receptionist can set status to Confirmed.
Receptionist can set status to Cancelled.
Review note and timestamp are recorded.

user_stories.benefit: the receptionist can spot scheduling risk
acceptance_criteria: Same date/time active requests set conflict=true.
Cancelled requests do not block future slots.
